leadText: If you were looking for the Pokémon Horizons: The Series character, see Master Mayonnaise. Mayonnaise (Japanese: マヨネーズ Mayonnaise) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich . It adds the following modifiers to a sandwich it is used on: 8 Sweet Taste 20 Sour Taste -3 Egg Power 12 Exp. Power 21 Raid Power 2 Normal Type Power 2 Fighting Type Power

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A condiment that packs a very tart punch yet pairs well with various ingredients.
